name: Cream of Pecan Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and sauté for 5 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in the flour, broth (or water and vegetable bouillon cube), soy sauce, vegetable seasoning, and nutmeg.
4. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the ground pecans and celery leaves; stir to incorporate.
7. Continue simmering for 10 minutes until the soup thickens slightly.
8. Stir in the cream or half & half, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Remove from heat and garnish with fresh mint sprigs before serving.
